caption: A man with short, greyish hair and a beard is seated in a studio with dark, ribbed acoustic foam walls. He wears over-ear black headphones and a dark jacket over a grey shirt. A professional condenser microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of his face. In the beginning, the man looks slightly upward and to his left. He then shifts his gaze sharply to the right, his eyes wide and eyebrows raised. He then looks down, momentarily closing his eyes with a neutral expression, before fully closing his eyes and tilting his head slightly downward in a gesture of resignation or fatigue. The camera remains static throughout the sequence, focusing on his upper body and facial expressions as he reacts. No text or logos are visible in the frames.
